objective: Make TokenStack show account-level Codex usage, rate-limit windows, and reset credits on Windows by using the authenticated Codex app-server, while keeping local JSONL import as local history only.
hard_requirements: Do not parse or export raw auth tokens.
Do not use private ChatGPT or Codex web endpoints.
Do not launch interactive Codex TUI or PTY flows during automatic refresh.
Do not use Windows local files as account profile totals.
Keep account snapshots separate from local usage events.
Kill and wait for app-server children on timeout or error.
Export sanitized diagnostics that explain Windows failures.
acceptance: Dashboard account lifetime usage comes from account/usage/read when available.
Rate-limit windows and reset credits come from account/rateLimits/read.
Missing account snapshots render unavailable or degraded, not zero.
Diagnostics export writes a sanitized file and returns the path.
Tests prove no reset-credit consume call exists.
